GOALOS AGIALPHA ASCENSION · INTEGRATED INTO AGIJOBMANAGER ASCENSION

Sovereign
Machine
Economy.

A single public implementation surface for the Meta-Agentic institution foundry, AGI Alpha Node runtime, AGI Jobs work OS, and AGIJobManager Mainnet settlement rail. The page is local by default; the Expert Console is the separated authority surface for live wallet operations.

Run local economy cycleOpen Expert Mainnet ConsoleInspect Evidence Docket
Operating boundary: public route, local deterministic cycle, zero external actions. Live wallet connection, token approval, network switching and Mainnet broadcast are restricted to the separated Expert Console and require explicit user confirmation.

αJ
Proof
Meta-Agentic
α‑AGI
Alpha Node
v0
AGI Jobs

AGIJobManager
settlement
Human
authority
01 · Meta-Agentic α‑AGI

Institution Foundry

Composes missions, candidate institutions, proof obligations and selection rationale. Emits GoalOSCommit and SelectionCertificate surfaces.

02 · AGI Alpha Node v0

Deterministic Runtime

Executes bounded proof flights with state, telemetry, sentinel posture and reproducible local evidence. Emits RunCommitment and ProofPacket surfaces.

03 · AGI Jobs v0 (v2)

Work OS

Defines the work civilization layer: jobs, validators, proof parliament, role boundaries, market state and Chronicle-ready completion packages.

04 · AGIJobManager

Settlement Rail

Provides the Mainnet contract identity for escrow, validation, dispute, finalization and authoritative settlement review.

PROTOCOL BLUEPRINT

Request → escrow → execute → proof → validate → settle → chronicle.

mandatecomposerouteexecuteprovevalidatesettlechronicleselectrollback

The repository now contains data contracts, schemas, tests and site routes that bind the public website claims to implementation files. The public pages remain proof and review surfaces; the Expert Console carries the deliberately gated Mainnet capability.

MISSION CONTRACT

Commission bounded work

0 wallet connections
0 public broadcasts
human review required

PROOF FLIGHT

Ten gate replay

CHRONICLE

Review package
